title: Claude Code Review Output
description: Structured output schema for code review results from cc_review. Matches codex-plugin-cc review-output.schema.json format.

verdict.description: Overall review verdict. approve = no significant issues. needs-attention = material risk worth blocking on. request_changes = issues that should be fixed. reject = fundamental problems.

summary.description: Terse ship/no-ship assessment, not a neutral recap

findings.description: List of specific findings from the review, ordered by severity (critical first)

file.description: File path where the finding was identified

line_start.description: Start line number in the file

line_end.description: End line number in the file

recommendation.description: Concrete change that would reduce the risk

assumptions.description: Assumptions identified in the implementation (adversarial mode)

risk.description: What happens if this assumption is wrong

residual_risk.description: Any remaining risk after addressing the findings
